text.title: LinkedIn Ads Campaign Strategy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: verify-icp-fit
step.action: Confirm LTV ≥ $5k and seniority filter Director+. If not, STOP.
step.decision-gate: If LTV < $5k OR seniority < Director, route to Meta / Google Ads instead.

step.name: seed-account-list
step.action: Build matched-account list of 100-1000 ICP companies; load via LinkedIn matched audiences.

step.name: pick-format
step.action: TOFU → single image / video / document. MOFU → lead-gen form. BOFU → conversation to warm.
step.decision-gate: If conversation ad is selected, verify audience is warm-only or BLOCK.

step.name: set-kpi-and-budget
step.action: Target cost-per-MQL = LTV × close_rate × budget_share. Set daily budget + frequency cap ≤4/wk.

step.name: wire-mql-feedback
step.action: Send offline conversions back via LinkedIn API; report cost-per-MQL + MQL→SQL weekly.
step.decision-gate: If MQL→SQL < 10% after 4 weeks, pause and review ICP filters.
